Weights: 35% Momentum + 30% Health + 35% Extension

Methodology

Scimode exit_signal_test.py
Methodology (scimode-validated)

Combined Score = 35% Momentum + 30% Pullback Health + 35% SMA29 Extension

SMA29 Extension = (Close - SMA29) / SMA29. Buckets from scimode exit_signal_test.py (154,979 trending observations, 1390 tickers):

ZoneExtensionWin RateMedian 21d FwdScore
OPTIMAL0-10%54-55%+0.69 to +0.86%90-95
GOOD10-15%53.1%+0.85%75
FAIR15-20%51.9%+0.71%55
CAUTION20-25%51.5%+0.60%40
WARNING25-40%50-52%+0.66 to +1.17%20-25
DANGER40-60%47.6%0.00%10
EXTREME60%+43.5%-2.70%0

Momentum Score: From momentum_ranker_v1_18 composite (returns + ratios + SPY-relative days).

Health Score: From pullback_health (NATR drawdown, SMA structure, slope stage, vol expansion, beta-adjusted DD, historical recovery).

Ideal entry: High momentum + healthy pullback + optimal SMA29 zone (0-10% extension). These are stocks trending up with room to run.
